headline: The Drone Revolution's Dependence on Chinese Rare Earth Processing - OilPrice.com Market Commentary
summary: Ukraine produced 1.2 million drones in 2024 alone. The scale is significant, as Ukraine is now deploying roughly 9,000 drones per day. But all of those drones share one vulnerability: virtually every magnet in the Ukrainian drones used in 2024 was manufactured in China. And the same is true for Western defense systems across the board. Companies mentioned in this release include: REalloys Inc. (ALOY), Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO), Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: A

headline: Broadcom Deepens AI Data Center Role With New DSP And Cooling
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced the Taurus BCM83640 3nm 400G/lane PAM-4 optical DSP, designed for high bandwidth AI data centers. The company also announced a partnership with JetCool to deliver production-scale direct to chip liquid cooling for multi kilowatt ASICs. Together, these launches target bandwidth and thermal challenges in next generation AI infrastructure, including 1.6T and 3.2T optical transceiver use cases. These product moves come as Broadcom trades at a share price...

content.title: Broadcom Deepens AI Data Center Role With New DSP And Cooling
content.summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced the Taurus BCM83640 3nm 400G/lane PAM-4 optical DSP, designed for high bandwidth AI data centers. The company also announced a partnership with JetCool to deliver production-scale direct to chip liquid cooling for multi kilowatt ASICs. Together, these launches target bandwidth and thermal challenges in next generation AI infrastructure, including 1.6T and 3.2T optical transceiver use cases. These product moves come as Broadcom trades at a share price...
